schema.branch: git branch, if a dedicated branch/worktree is in use; null if working directly on main per this repo's concurrent-session convention

conventions: This repo's CLAUDE.md establishes that concurrent sessions committing directly to main is the normal, expected workflow here — not a conflict. Claims below are advisory scoping to avoid two agents editing the same files at once; they are not a substitute for reading git status/log before editing.

Relay (w5) owns: root package.json, package-lock.json (only when a dependency change is unavoidable), tsconfig.base.json, server/prisma/schema.prisma + migrations directory (registry-level changes only, not feature-scoped model additions which stay with Forge Systems), central navigation registration in app/index.html's nav shell, server/src/index.ts route registration, global auth middleware in server/src/access/, ops/admin-live/*, scripts/ship-live-admin.mjs, and this .termina/ directory.
Vertical-slice owners (w2 Forge Experience, w3 Forge Systems) claim their own feature paths here before editing them; Relay reviews and releases claims at each integration checkpoint.

claims.task: Baseline snapshot, rollback tag, mission-state scaffolding, root-scope survey (read-only)
